series_metadata.series_description: Official minutes, orders, and decisions of the Board, including any appendices, attachments, or referenced materials.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until 2 years after minutes have been transcribed, reviewed for accuracey and completeness, approved and signed by Acting Board Officers. Scan to CD-ROM then transfer to State Archives. ; Electronic: CD-ROM: Retain permanently., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Permanent
